title: Emissive Trims
description: Makes armor trims glow in the dark. No mods needed!
body: # Info This resourcepack makes armor trims glow in the dark. This should also work with all datapacks and resourcepacks that add/change armor trims. It even works with my own Colorful Trims datapack (Scroll down for more info). Warning: This resourcepack uses core shaders to make it emissive / glow. Due to this, it may not work with optifine and iris shaders. It does however work in vanilla & with sodium. # Screenshots ### Diamond silence trimmed ![Example image of glowing trims](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gxUihgVw/images/77b77fe79ae7b5761f17f950760b7a6a128318b5.png) ### Random trim combination ![Another example image of trim glowing in the dark](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gxUihgVw/images/c68f79423b9bc7dd1a6bfd48fea4073a47ee3c76.png) # Other You can also use this with my datapack, Colorful Trims! [![Colorful Trims](https://github.com/BluebirdDevs/random/blob/main/colorfultrims.png?raw=true)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/colorful-trims) ### Want to use this with my other packs? The above pack combines all of the following: [![Sparked host sponsor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3fdc990911fad7d2e86556421b70f72ab56ab3a6_0.webp)](https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=3158)
